creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
kuriyama    2011-08-05 00:35:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/gnupg       Makefile distinfo 
  Removed files:
    security/gnupg/files patch-g10__pkglue.c 
  Log:
  - Upgrade to 2.0.18:
    - Support the SSH confirm flag and show SSH fingerprints in ssh
      related pinentries.
    - Improved dirmngr/gpgsm interaction for OCSP.
    - Allow generation of card keys up to 4096 bit.
  
  - Improve for port:
    - Remove patch that was incorporated into this release.
    - Remove redundant BUILD_DEPENDS.
    - Patching should be done in a -patch target. Silence the REINPLACE.
  
  Submitted by:   dougb
  PR:             ports/159520
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.141     +4 -6      ports/security/gnupg/Makefile
  1.54      +4 -4      ports/security/gnupg/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -24     ports/security/gnupg/files/patch-g10__pkglue.c (dead)
